hooks.command: SERVICES=(auth-service user-service workspace-service task-service notification-service); CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null; git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null); for svc in "${SERVICES[@]}"; do if echo "$CHANGED" | grep -q "^services/$svc/"; then echo "=== Verifying $svc ==="; (cd "services/$svc" && pnpm run lint && pnpm run build && pnpm run test); fi; done
